## Validation

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run check:file-length`
- [ ] `bun run check:secrets`
- [ ] `bun run check:version` (required for release-related changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials or private data added
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Output format behavior remains parseable for agents
- [ ] Error handling remains consistent (`type: error` payloads)
